# A-Gent

> A-Gent is the one place to get both a packaged AI SDR platform (A-Gent Fleet) and hands-on AI consulting. One partner, two ways to deploy: run always-on AI agents for GTM execution, or have A-Gent design and build a bespoke revenue system around your stack.

A-Gent serves B2B SaaS revenue teams. The product is A-Gent Fleet — an autonomous AI SDR platform that researches accounts, detects buying signals, personalizes outreach, keeps a human in the loop, and updates pipeline. AI Consulting is the service side, for teams that need a custom, bespoke build.

## Get started

- Start a free trial (15 days): https://aisdr.a-gent.co/offers-demo.html
- Book a demo: https://a-gent.co/#book-demo
- Free AI revenue assessment: https://a-gent.co/assessment

## Core pages

- Home: https://a-gent.co
- Platform (Fleet capabilities): https://a-gent.co/platform
- Modules (the four product modules): https://a-gent.co/modules
- Fleet (the AI SDR product): https://a-gent.co/fleet
- AI Consulting (bespoke builds): https://a-gent.co/consulting
- About: https://a-gent.co/about
- Blog (insights on AI SDRs and revenue automation): https://a-gent.co/blog/

## Product modules

- AI SDR: always-on AI sales rep — researches accounts, detects buying signals, writes personalized outreach, routes replies through a human review queue.
- Worker Marketplace: browse and hire AI workers with real identities through a 3-step onboarding flow. https://aisdr.a-gent.co/workers.html
- Interactive AI Demo: a photorealistic AI agent that walks visitors through the platform via chat or voice.
- Mission Control: the command center — live campaign metrics, agent status, and workforce activity. https://missioncontrol.a-gent.co

## Flagship platform differentiators

- Signal Engine: source-linked buying signals that give every message a timely, verifiable reason to reach out. https://a-gent.co/platform/signal-engine
- Loop Engine: self-optimizing outbound that improves email quality with an LLM-judge keep-or-revert loop under hard guardrails. https://a-gent.co/platform/loop-engine

## Platform capabilities

Find & Research (prospecting, company & lead database, lead qualification, deep account research, signal detection), Engage & Convert (AI personalization, GAP-selling messaging, multi-step sequences, smart replies, human review queue, intelligent routing), and Measure & Scale (operating dashboard, deliverability & inbox health, social signal scheduling, reporting) — all on a secure, multi-tenant foundation with CRM integration.

## Apps

- Launch Console (Fleet app): https://fleet.a-gent.co/login
- Mission Control: https://missioncontrol.a-gent.co
- Worker Marketplace: https://aisdr.a-gent.co/workers.html
